subcodes.first_line: O thou servant who gazeth upon God! Hearken unto My call from around the Throne: Verily, there is no God but [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ان یا ایها العبد الناظر الی الله ان استمع ندائی من حول العرش انه لا اله الا
subcodes.subjects: @tests and trials; sacrifice and suffering, @spiritual transformation, @service to others; to the Cause of God, @power of prayer, @praise and encouragement, @pioneering; travel teaching, @detachment; severance; renunciation; patience
